Headline: #85 Central Temporary Reroute at Central/Lake
ShortDescription: 85 Central buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to street blockage near Central/Lake.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#85 Central buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Central, Chicago, Austin, Washington, Central, and resume normal route, due to street blockage near Central/Lake.

Allow extra travel time.
